market_sentiment.summary: 資料更新中，請稍後再試

articles.title: Toddlers learn by falling: Why DeFi's $20 billion TVL drop is just a market stress-test
articles.description: DeFi Technologies president Andrew Forson says the stablecoin layer is thriving, with more than $150 billion in U.S. Treasuries backing coins like USDT and USDC.

articles.title: U.S. says troops were targeted with location data, as senator warns ad industry is a ‘national security threat’
articles.description: One leading privacy lawmaker said it was time to "start treating the adtech industry as a national security threat."

articles.title: Sui blockchain suffers another network outage as transactions grind to a halt
articles.description: This is the second time this year that the Sui network has suffered an outage.

articles.title: How long is Anthropic’s lease with SpaceX? Opinions vary.
articles.description: Elon Musk is publicly reframing xAI’s massive Anthropic compute deal as short-term and cancellable, despite SpaceX’s own S-1 filing describing payments through May 2029.

articles.title: Sesame, the conversational AI startup from Oculus founders, launches its iOS app
articles.description: Sesame’s new iOS app brings its conversational AI agents to the public, offering more natural back-and-forth interactions designed to feel less like traditional chatbots and more like talking to a person.

articles.title: Slate Auto will start taking orders for its low-cost EV on June 24
articles.description: The Bezos-backed EV startup has yet to announce final pricing for its vehicle, which is supposed to start shipping by the end of this year.

articles.title: Bitcoin pinned below $73,000 despite potential U.S.-Iran deal news
articles.description: U.S. stocks and bonds, and the oil market are reacting positively to yet another purported peace agreement, but crypto markets remain under heavy pressure.

articles.title: Argentina bill targets crypto payments to illegal gambling sites
articles.description: Argentina’s proposed online gambling bill would restrict banks, payment firms and crypto providers from serving unauthorized betting platforms.

articles.title: A blockchain lottery plans to turn crypto gambling fees into Ethereum developer funding
articles.description: Decentralized lottery protocol Megapot is teaming up with Protocol Guild in what the firms describe as the crypto industry’s first programmable charity lottery.

articles.title: Crypto Long & Short: Asia’s regulated crypto future
articles.description: Asia's adoption of crypto and stablecoins is driving regulated growth in payments and remittances. Learn how Singapore, Hong Kong, India, and Korea are leading the way.

articles.title: Here’s what happened in crypto today
articles.description: Need to know what happened in crypto today? Here is the latest news on daily trends and events impacting Bitcoin price, blockchain, DeFi, Web3 and crypto regulation.

articles.title: ERC-7943 author says institutions can’t play DeFi’s ‘pirate game’
articles.description: RWA standard ERC-7943 reaches final stage as Ethereum builders rethink how institutional finance move onchain.

articles.title: Sneak peek at new Siri app reveals Apple’s plans to take on ChatGPT and more
articles.description: New renders offer a closer look at Apple’s planned AI overhaul for iOS 27, including a redesigned Siri experience powered and standalone Siri app.

articles.title: Rivian under investigation over rear suspension failures on R1 models
articles.description: At least two owners have lost control of their vehicles after a critical suspension component broke. In both cases, the vehicles had been previously serviced.

articles.title: RSI is the new AGI — and it’s just as hard to pin down
articles.description: A new crop of AI labs are focused on recursive self-improvement — but the goal is proving elusive.

articles.title: At TechCrunch Disrupt 2026: Databricks’ co-founder on what kills enterprise AI deals
articles.description: Enterprise AI is entering a different phase now, one where enterprises are no longer evaluating whether AI is exciting. They are evaluating whether it is safe to deploy broadly.

articles.title: YouTube adds new podcast features, including an AI recommendation tool and ‘Auto speed’
articles.description: The update signals YouTube's ongoing efforts to compete with other platforms for podcast audiences.

articles.title: StanChart says Ethereum price will catch up to bullish internal metrics
articles.description: Standard Chartered reaffirms bullish Ether price targets, citing strong network fundamentals even as ETH trades 57% below its 2025 peak and fund flows turn negative.

articles.title: Startup Battlefield 200 application deadline extended to June 8 after overwhelming demand
articles.description: After overwhelming demand from founders around the world, TechCrunch has extended the Startup Battlefield 200 application deadline to June 8. Nominate a standout startup or apply yours today.

articles.title: Disciplined AI agents are the disruptor needed to break the exchange churn model
articles.description: Programmable incentives that allow independent trading agents to earn only when portfolios rise will create a fairer market for retail customers, explains Naja.
